basic_details.job_title: EdCIL AAI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant Posts at Airports Authority of India
basic_details.organization_name: EDCIL Airports Authority of India (EdCIL AAI)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Consultant, Associate Consultant and More
basic_details.short_information: EdCIL (India) Limited, a Mini Ratna Category-I CPSE under the Ministry of Education, is the recruitment agency facilitating these engagements on behalf of AAI. All positions are purely contractual, initially for one year, with a possibility of extension. The recruitment covers five advertisement numbers, collectively offering posts across several specializations.

important_dates.raw: Knowing the key dates is the first step before applying. All advertisements share the same application window. | Opening date for online applications: 12 June 2026 (10:00 HRS) Last date to apply online: 28 June 2026 (23:55 HRS) Cut-off date for age, qualification, and experience: 28 June 2026 | Note: Candidates are strongly advised not to wait until the last date. AAI will not be responsible if applications cannot be submitted due to last-minute server rush.

salary_details.details: Here is a quick reference to the all-inclusive monthly remuneration for each position:

how_to_apply: All applications must be submitted online only — no hard copies will be accepted. The process is straightforward but requires preparation in advance.

Step 1 - Registration Visit the AAI/EdCIL online application portal. Click on "Register" and fill in your personal and contact details. Generate and submit the OTP sent to your registered email and mobile number. You will receive your Application Sequence Number (Login ID) and password.

Step 2 - Fill the Application Form Log back in using your credentials. Complete all sections including eligibility criteria, communication details, qualification details, and experience details. Upload your photograph, signature, and scanned copies of all relevant certificates.

Step 3 - Upload Documents All certificates must be in PDF/JPG/JPEG format, minimum 100 KB and maximum 1,000 KB. Your scanned photograph (passport size, white background) must be 100-200 KB in JPG/JPEG format. Your signature (black or blue ink on white paper) must be 80-150 KB.
Step 4 - Preview and Submit Use the Preview tab to verify all information before final submission. Once submitted, the application cannot be edited.
Step 5 - Save the Printout Retain a printed copy of the submitted application for future reference.
Important: There is no application fee for any of these posts. Do not send any hard copies to AAI CHQ.

faq.question: Q1. What is EdCIL AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: EdCIL AAI Recruitment 2026 refers to a set of five contractual recruitment advertisements (Nos. 02, 04, 06, 07, and 08 of 2026) issued by EdCIL (India) Limited on behalf of Airports Authority of India (AAI), inviting applications for Consultant positions across multiple directorates at AAI's Corporate Headquarters in New Delhi.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AAI Consultant posts 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for all EdCIL AAI Consultant posts 2026 is 28 June 2026 at 23:55 HRS. Applications open from 12 June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are there in EdCIL AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Across all five advertisements, there are approximately 16 vacancies: 2 in Airport Security, 9 in Planning (4 Architects + 5 Data Analysts), 1 in HRM Pension Cell, 2 in SIU, and 2 in CSR Directorate.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for AAI Consultant posts in 2026?
faq.answer: Monthly remuneration ranges from Rs. 70,000/- for Associate Consultant posts in the Planning Directorate to Rs. 1,80,000/- for the Principal Consultant (Security) post. All amounts are all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for AAI Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no application fee for any of the consultant posts under EdCIL AAI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for AAI Consultant posts 2026?
faq.answer: Age limits vary by post: 30 years for Associate Consultants (Planning), 35 years for Junior Consultants (SIU), 40 years for Consultant (CSR), 45 years for Senior Consultants (CSR, HRM, Security), and 55 years for Principal Consultant (Security). Age is calculated as of 28 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is the AAI Consultant engagement permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: All engagements are purely contractual, initially for one year, with provision for extension based on AAI's requirements and applicable rules.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the selected consultants be posted?
faq.answer: All selected consultants will be posted exclusively at AAI Corporate Headquarters, Safdarjung Airport, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for AAI Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves evaluation of academic qualifications and experience, followed by document verification and a personal interview. Shortlisted candidates are notified by email only.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply for more than one post in EdCIL AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can apply for more than one post, but they must submit a separate online application for each post they wish to be considered for.
